parameters.name: active
parameters.label: Active
parameters.description: When active, the cooks its inputs and writes to the memory block.

parameters.name: name
parameters.label: Shared Mem Name
parameters.description: Name of the memory block that it writes to.

parameters.name: memtype
parameters.label: Shared Mem Type
parameters.description: Writes to a or a memory location.

parameters.name: downloadtype
parameters.label: Download Type
parameters.description: Select between Immediate(Slow) and Next (Fast) for better performance.
